attacking_style: Participates in breakaway moves rather than late attacks, willing to attempt tactical bridges when breakaways fragment. Shows capacity for sustained solo efforts in time trials.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns. Operates with autonomy in breakaways and individual time trial stages.
terrain_preference: Excels in time trials with strong power output. Capable on moderate climbs like Peñón de Ifach but profile suggests TT specialist rather than pure climber.
vulnerability: Limited observations suggest vulnerability when breakaways collapse on punchy finishes, unable to capitalize on fragmentation into winning position.
key_patterns: Strong time trial specialist: set benchmark time 23 seconds ahead of junior world champion.
Breakaway tactician: attempts bridges when groups fragment rather than sitting in.
form_trajectory: positive: Set significant TT benchmark at Vuelta, showing strong form in speciality discipline during Grand Tour
